subject: feat(structure): add per-cell insert, delete, move, and resize controls
body:
Restructure the Structure tab into two clear control groups:
1. Section controls (Row/Column): add above/below, move up/down, height/width slider, delete
2. Cell controls (subdivision): add left/right, move left/right, width/height slider, delete

Previously cell management was limited to a +/- counter that only appended/removed
from the end. Now users can insert cells at specific positions, remove any specific
cell, and reorder cells within a section — all with proper cell index shifting.

For column layouts, labels are transposed (add col left/right, cell above/below, etc).

Tags: structure, layout, ui, cells
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
